description_long: This is a classic street motorcycle with a low, elongated frame and a black and silver color scheme. It features a prominent fuel tank, a padded seat for one or two riders, and chrome exhaust pipes running along the side. The motorcycle is equipped with two large wheels, front and rear suspension, and a set of side mirrors mounted on the handlebars. Visible details include turn signals, a headlight, a rear license plate, and a side-mounted storage compartment. The overall design suggests a utilitarian yet stylish vehicle suitable for urban commuting or leisure rides.
description: A black and silver street motorcycle with chrome accents, a padded seat, and side mirrors, designed for urban riding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlight, front wheel, handlebars with mirrors, and turn signals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuel tank, seat, chrome exhaust, and side storage compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate, rear wheel, and seat profile.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, suspension, and overall frame structure.
